title: Aehr Test Systems Riding the Silicon Carbide Demand Wave
text: Aehr Test Systems is positioned to capitalize on accelerating silicon carbide adoption in electric vehicles. The company's FOX-P and FOX-XP wafer-level burn-in systems have become the industry standard for silicon carbide device testing and qualification. Major automotive suppliers and semiconductor manufacturers are increasing orders as EV production ramps globally. Market research forecasts silicon carbide semiconductor demand to grow at 48% compound annual growth rate through 2030. Aehr's winning formula combines advanced technology, customer relationships, and operational excellence. The company has secured seven silicon carbide customers with over a dozen additional prospects in development.
